title: hieracium melanophorum
intro: Hieracium melanophorum, also known as Devil's-bit scabious or Black scabious, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various ailments such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Hieracium melanophorum include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe and heal the skin, as well as reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
